channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Massachusetts Democrat suggests Trump’s TikTok support stems from his popularity on the app
item.description: Rep. Jake Auchincloss (D-Mass.) suggested that President-elect Trump's opposition to a TikTok ban comes from his popularity on the app and the video-sharing platform lobby’s influence on his inner circle. “With Donald Trump, it’s always some combination of two things, Jim.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Tech investor Cathie Wood on how Trump can boost the U.S. economy
item.description: U.S. tech investor Cathie Wood is calling on Donald Trump’s incoming administration to boost economic growth and policy certainty by backdating promised corporate and personal tax cuts to Jan. 1, 2025, she told Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Lawmakers, former officials weigh in on TikTok ban as case heads to Supreme Court
item.description: Top lawmakers, First Amendment advocacy groups and President-elect Trump weighed in Friday on a law that could ban TikTok in the U.S., as the Supreme Court prepares to take up the case.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Battle Over Electric Bicycles: Lawsuit Filed Against Super73 Inc.
item.description: A Fairfax resident has filed a lawsuit against electric-bicycle manufacturer Super73 Inc., alleging the company sells vehicles that are illegal under California law.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Macdonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Nearly all companies expect a major outage in 2025
item.description: After 2024's CrowdStrike-induced outage, IT leaders are more worried about “when” the next outage will be, not “if” there’ll be one.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Everything new on Hulu in January 2025
item.description: Hulu is gearing up to launching another load of movie and shows to the platform to kick off the new year. Here's everything new on Hulu in January 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Delivering efficiencies through automated software testing
item.description: Learn how innovative testing strategies can empower your team to deliver faster, better and more reliable software. The post Delivering efficiencies through automated software testing first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill
item.description: The latest authorization bill pushes the intelligence community to boost many of its workforce and tech efforts, including its public-private talent exchange. The post Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: NASA probe attempts historic Christmas Eve approach to the sun
item.description: NASA’s Parker Solar Probe made a historic attempt to circle the sun at 6:53 a.m. EST on Tuesday, Christmas Eve, which, if successful, would be the closest-ever attempt to do so.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Scammers exploited mom’s fears to steal her entire life's savings
item.description: Rising elder scams: How to recognize them and protect yourself and your loved ones. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you outsmart the scammers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
